mapper.select: SELECT po.*, s.supplier_name, s.supplier_code, w.warehouse_name, u1.real_name as operator_name, u2.real_name as auditor_name FROM purchase_order po LEFT JOIN supplier s ON po.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON po.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON po.operator_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u2 ON po.auditor_id = u2.user_id WHERE po.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT pi.*, d.drug_name, d.specification, d.unit FROM purchase_item pi LEFT JOIN drug_info d ON pi.drug_id = d.drug_id WHERE pi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY pi.item_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_order WHERE status = '待审核'
